displaySummary.zh: 科幻预言、技术狂热与 AI 寒冬
displaySummary.en: Sci-Fi Prophecy, Hype and AI Winters

displayDescription.zh: AI 安全中心 2023 年发布的 AI 风险声明，把降低 AI 灭绝风险表述为全球优先事项。这个事件标志着公共情绪周期中的新高点：关于高级 AI 的担忧被压缩成一则简短的共识式声明。
displayDescription.en: The Center for AI Safety's 2023 Statement on AI Risk framed mitigation of extinction risk from AI as a global priority. The event marks a new peak in the public emotional cycle: advanced-AI concern was compressed into a short consensus-style statement.

description.en: Official statement page used as the primary source for the 2023 risk node.
description.zh: 2023 年风险节点使用的官方声明页面。

license.en: Reference link only; page text and signatory portraits are not reused.
license.zh: 仅作为参考链接；不复用页面文字或签署者肖像。

html.zh: 这份声明出现在 2023 年生成式 AI 与前沿模型讨论快速升温期间。它的重要性在于把极端 AI 风险变成一个简洁的公共命题，而不只是长篇专业论证。
html.en: The statement appeared during the rapid public rise of generative AI and frontier-model debate in 2023. Its importance lies in making extreme AI risk a concise public proposition rather than a long specialist argument.

html.zh: 这里的情绪机制是优先级压缩：一组复杂的技术、社会与政治关切被凝缩成单一高风险框架。这种压缩让声明有力量，也让它充满争议。
html.en: The emotional mechanism is priority compression: a complex set of technical, social and political concerns is condensed into a single high-stakes risk frame. That compression made the statement powerful, but also controversial.

html.zh: 专家通常把这份声明视为前沿 AI 安全话语的重要公共标记，即使他们对其框架存在分歧。它的遗产是把存在性风险、治理与技术安全放进同一公共讨论。
html.en: Experts generally treat the statement as a major public marker of frontier-AI safety discourse, even when they disagree about its framing. Its legacy is to put existential risk, governance and technical safety into the same public conversation.

notes.zh: 由 legacy generated milestone 批量生成的 variant；展示层默认不覆盖 legacy。
notes.en: Variant batch-generated from the generated legacy milestone; presentation does not override legacy by default.

modernTerm.en: Frontier AI safety, governance and catastrophic-risk mitigation
modernTerm.zh: 前沿 AI 安全、治理与灾难性风险缓解

branchSummary.zh: AI 风险关切被压缩成一则全球优先事项声明，并获得研究界与公共领域签署。
branchSummary.en: AI-risk concern became a compact global-priority statement signed across research and public life.

what.en: A short statement made extreme AI risk a globally framed public priority.
what.zh: 一则短声明把极端 AI 风险变成全球优先事项。

how.en: The statement used concise moral framing and prominent signatories to make the concern legible beyond technical communities.
how.zh: 声明通过简洁的道德框架和知名签署者，让关切超出技术共同体而被理解。

why.en: It completes the branch's arc by showing old machine anxieties returning in twenty-first-century governance language.
why.zh: 它完成了这条分支的弧线：旧有机器焦虑以二十一世纪治理语言重新出现。

area.zh: 全球 AI 风险框架
